ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the order belongs to */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the order belongs to */,
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of item sold */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales channel */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the priority level of the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost per unit */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from the order */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of goods sold for the order */,
  "total_profit" REAL /* Total profit from the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES order_priorities ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_item_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_type_id") REFERENCES item_types ("item_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_manager_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the regional manager responsible for the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the country belongs to */,
  "country_manager_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the country manager responsible for the country */,
  "country_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type */,
  "item_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the item type */,
  "item_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the item type belongs to */,
  "item_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory the item type belongs to */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the item type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_types_item_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_category_id") REFERENCES item_categories ("item_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_types_item_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_subcategory_id") REFERENCES item_subcategories ("item_subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel */,
  "channel_manager_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the manager responsible for the sales channel */,
  "channel_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the sales channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level */,
  "priority_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the order priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the manager for the user */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* The date when the user was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the order */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* The device used for accessing the sales data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "item_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item category */,
  "item_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the item category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_subcategories" (
  "item_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item subcategory */,
  "item_subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the item subcategory */,
  "item_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_subcategories_item_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_category_id") REFERENCES item_categories ("item_category_id")
)
